events.content: "Evidence": "npx markdownlint-cli2 on the two edited .agents/*.md files: 0 errors (files under .agents/** are lint-ignored by repo config; ran anyway to confirm)."
"Evidence": "Not invoked; single-round bot-comment response, no novel failure mode."

"Round 11: corrected session-log endingCommit (6b338e9c) per Copilot. The pre-commit episode extractor (.claude/skills/memory/scripts/extract_session_episode.py) parses session logs as markdown; since logs are now JSON it emits outcome=failure, empty task, error-typed evidence events, and a wrong commit count. Same shape affects episodes 1830/1831/1832 from main. Hand-corrected episode-2026-05-13-session-1833.json and committed with SKIP_AUTOFIX=1 so the extractor does not regenerate the buggy version. Extractor rewrite tracked separately, out of scope here.",
